title: Definitive Paper-Ready Consolidation: JRN Hypothesis Scorecard & 8 Paper Tables
summary: Demo notebook that loads pre-computed evaluation results from 16 experiments across 4 relational datasets (rel-f1, rel-stack, rel-avito, rel-hm) and demonstrates 8 paper-ready statistical tables plus a hypothesis scorecard. Includes Fisher z random-effects meta-analysis, Cohen's d paired effect sizes, Wilcoxon tests, sign tests with binomial CIs, and training-free proxy rankings. The notebook processes 60 curated examples from 284 total, computes 63 aggregate metrics, grades 6 hypothesis claims (A/B/C/D), and produces a 4-panel visualization showing the scorecard, key metrics, FK-shuffling decomposition, and chain compounding predicted vs measured JRN values.
